feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Concurrent Employment / Rehire with new employment: Reuse Data Records from Custom MDF Objects
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to reuse Data from the previous employment (Empoyment Data and Custom MDF Data) in case of concurrent employment or rehire with new employment? 

If there is no standard way, is there any known Workaround?

Thank you so much and KR,

M.

entry.title: Global Assignment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently we are using custom portlet for Global Assignment. We are wanting to implement standard Global Assignment functionality and have all the custom fields from custom portlet in Global Assignment. Can we create all these fields in Global Assignment and then populate all the values from standard to custom portlet when Add global assignment event has taken place.

Also, Could you help us with best practices on implementing global assignment as to how the design should be.

Regards,

Vamsi

entry.title: Delete Previous Attachment from Personal Information and Work Permit Portlet for new time slice
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please guide me on a way (either via business rule or some other way) to automatically remove previous attachments from Personal Information and Work Permit Portlet as soon as new time slice of these portlet is created/inserted.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Reports to Support AAP Reporting
entry.content:
Hi there! Is there a good system provided/generated report to use for Affirmative Action Plan reporting purposes? For instance, a report of promotions and transfers showing old and new values for: job title, department, location and manager? 

Or does anyone have guidance on how to create a report to show these old and new values? We've created a canvas report, but it's limited to only reporting on 1-2 previous fields. 

Thank you!

entry.title: How can I remove "Manager" as a recipient of a specific Completed Document Email Notification?
entry.content: Our Document Completed Notification setting is set to be sent to "Manager and Employee." There is ONE template I would like to go to Employee only. Is there a way to remove "Manager" as a recipient of a specific template?

entry.title: How can I make a bar graph to see how many people are in each month from January to December?
entry.content:
I would like to calculate the number of people who are active in Employment Status for each month in 2023. How can I make a bar graph to see how many people are in each month from January to December?

(in SF Story Report)

entry.title: Setting a field in mdf object mandatory if current user is a specific permission group
entry.content:
Is there a possibility to set a field in an mdf object mandatory if the current user is within a specific permission group? Like:

User A (Permission Group A) selects MDF object, creates a new entry, field A, B and C are mandatory
User B (Persmission Group B) selects MDF object, creates a new entry, field A, B and C are not mandatory.

I didn't find a solution for this case - neither in business rules nor in Ui rules.

Thank you for providing support.

entry.title: Onboarding activation email not getting triggered for new hires
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We have one IAS related issue for one of the client who recently, enabled IAS for ONB2.0 but when we are adding any new hire to onboarding and initiating onboarding activation mail is not getting triggered for new hires to create their account and also when checked in Execution Manager Dashboard for real time sync it shows Completed with errors.

 

Further when checked Admin Alerts for error following error is seen

We have done all the configurations based on this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3204536

Also, when tried to manually sync onboarding users using read job in IAS Console following error comes up and users fail to sync in IAS:

error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://a76nl88ar.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users with statusCode: 400, Response: {"schemas":["urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error"],"status":"400","detail":"Invalid user attribute: sourceSystemId"},

Please let me know why I am getting these errors and how can i rectify this issue.

Regards,

entry.title: Highlight fields in EC
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to highlight newly created fields in EC in the same way like standard fields are setup?

Thank you and regards,

Aneta

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Start Time ,end time & paygrade mapping in document generation not working
entry.content:
Hi team,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to bring to your attention an issue we've encountered with our document generation process. Specifically, we've mapped the start time and end time of short leaves in our template, but unfortunately, this data is not reflecting in the custom mail notifications.

 

  1. start time & end time is not reflecting in mail notification
  2. pay grade is not reflecting in mail notification

    We only are able to map reference fields in the leave template & unable to find the fields in reference. If we are mapping start time, end time & paygrade of the employee as direct fields, in custom mail notification its not appearing. PFA the screenshot.

    Could you please look into this matter at your earliest convenience? It seems there may be a disconnect between how the data is mapped in the template and how it appears in the notifications.

    Your prompt attention to this issue would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Position workflow
entry.content:
Dear community experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can trigger WF when different changes are made on the position level.

We are currently facing a challenge because the WF is not getting triggered when on the Parent Position level changes are made. We added in the conditions the value: Position.Parent Position is not equal to OriginalValues.Parent Position , but was unsuccessful.

I would appreciate if you had some ideas on this challenge.

Best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Position Workflow
entry.content:
Dear community experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can trigger WF when different changes are made on the position level.

We are currently facing a challenge because the WF is not getting triggered when on the Parent Position level changes are made. We added in the conditions the value: Position.Parent Position is not equal to OriginalValues.Parent Position , but was unsuccessful.

I would appreciate if you had some ideas on this challenge.

Best regards,

Eli

entry.title: EC to S4 HANA replication
entry.content:
Hello All,

I need urgent help in EC to S4 HANA Replication.

We have a situation where EC is having different naming conversation exists for Object ids like A1-23030 and S4 HANA are only excepting numerical.

When I am trying to run report RH_SFIOM_PROC_ORG_STRUC_RPRQ, I am getting error in SLG1 as below:

FOJobFunction A1-23030: External ID from EC cannot be used as object ID in infotype 1000

Do someone had faced these scenarios before or anyone have any SAP standard solution for this.

Thank you a lot in advance,

Best Regards,

entry.title: How can I populate the Emplid field with the next assigned Employee ID in the Live Profile in SF
entry.content:
How can I populate the Emplid field with the next assigned Employee ID in the Live Profile in SuccessFactors?

I have created a business rule to automatically set the Employee ID in the Emplid field in the Biographical portlet upon hiring, but the Employee ID in the Live Profile is still showing no data/value. Thank you

entry.title: How to Convert Attachments on MDF Objects
entry.content:
Hi HCM Community,

I'm trying to convert a pdf attachment in the cust_attachment field on Payment Information and after doing the initial setup on the Zip file (create attachments folder and reference the pdf in the load file), the attachment does not populate in the UI after Importing the Zip (No errors are shown in Scheduled Job Manager). I wanted to ask this group if I missed a step in either the Import Sequence or Properties which will resolve this issue.

I've followed the steps outlined in this KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2257047 but am hoping to get further insight from members in this group.

 

Thanks in advance,

Jack

entry.title: Import New Pay Range - Update Existing Positions
entry.content:
Hi There

I have updated the pay scale range, min, mid and max and when I create a new position the updated values are there however for existing positions it has not updated the values. How do I do this?

entry.title: System roles in RBP
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we add or remove the users from System roles (dynamic) mapped groups, if yes how is it possible to manually add or remove the users.

For us the system role membership for 'HR Manager' role is given to if the user is mapped in job relationship as 'HR Manager' to any other user.

However, after removing this user as HR Manager from the respective users, this user (who is assigned as HR Manager) continues to have the permissions.

So kindly confirm if it's feasible to remove the permissions by removing the job relationship (or respective mapping).

 

Thanks,

Sneha

entry.title: Parallel Payroll Run from legacy system
entry.content:
Hi

We are new customer and implementing all the modules of SAP and now we are in stage of parallel payroll run from our infor Anael system to SAP ECP. Can anyone provide the detail document on parallel payroll run from 3rd party legacy to SAP ECP

Thanks

entry.title: Good Day Seniors,
entry.content: Please help  me with the Below error , i have valid legal ID , though getting the below error while importing the foundation data "Location" , please help help , i tried all the formats like Text , General, Number formats in CSV file but still getting the same error .

entry.title: Audit of changes Previous Employers (Work Experience)
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to check who and when added/removed data from People Profile for the specific user -> Career -> Work Experience -> block "Previous Employers" created as Live Profile MDF Information?

I've run some Audit Reports but I don't see there data from this block. 

Thank you and regards,

Aneta Krysiak

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
